     the Fermi energy is    -0.3542 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.57476897 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26581811 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137540.89935356 Ry
